text.title: vector-databases Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for vector-databases as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using a different embedding model at query time than at ingestion time.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Embedding model mismatch makes similarity scores meaningless. The distances computed between incompatible embedding spaces have no semantic interpretation. Store the model name as collection metadata and validate on startup.

failure-mode.description: Querying a Qdrant or Weaviate collection immediately after a large bulk upsert.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Both databases optimize indexes asynchronously. Queries immediately after a large upsert may hit partially-indexed data and return degraded recall. Add a ready-check before querying post-upsert.
